text: Kelizaza n…Ыv…Фl…Ф…Ф, ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы av…Ы Owusoso AkaavuћГ…Ф shu k…Ыl…Ы bakpaћА banun…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ …Фkas…Ы as…Ы g…Ы betse…Цe al…Ы ana. ref: вАЬWe found the jail locked tight and the guards standing at the doors. But when we opened the doors and went in, we didn't find anyone there.вАЭ
text: вАЬB…Фd…Ыm…Ф …Фs…Ы buduluћГ…Ф pete daћГa piapii, k…Ыl…Ы bag…Ы epo k…Ыl…Ы tsy…Ы eli kititiћА n…Ы buduluћГ…Ф, p…Ф g…Ыb…Ф dal…ЫћГ buvu…ФћГ, bag…Ыm…Ф ananaћА n…Ы b…Фl…Ы m…ЫћА.вАЭ

ref: The captain of the temple police and the chief priests listened to their report, but they did not know what to think about it.

ref: Just then someone came in and said, вАЬNow those men you put in jail are in the temple, teaching the people!вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы an…Ф teli aba ebetse…Цe bal…Ы as…Ы, вАЬNo…Цio, bany…Ы g…Ы novuћГ …Фkp…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф, n…Ы al…Ы bal…Ы eli akaa vuћГ…Ф shu p…Ы baakas…Ы banun…Ф …Фd…ФћГ.вАЭ

ref: The captain went with some of the temple police and brought the apostles back. But they did not use force. They were afraid that the people might start throwing stones at them.

ref: вАЬWe told you plainly not to teach in the name of Jesus. But look what you have done! You have been teaching all over Jerusalem, and you are trying to blame us for his death.вАЭ
text: Etse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬB…Фkp…Ы …Фsha k…Ф w…Фn…Ф gagaliћГ …Фs…Ы n…Фt…Фk…Ф kas…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ n…Ы kinye …Ыl…Ы m…Ы, p…Ф, n…Фk…Ф w…Фn…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ kakas…Ы tsy…Фa Yerusalem k…Ыl…Ы n…Фp…Ы …Фs…Ы t…ЫћА b…Ф≈ЛaћГ k…Ыp…Ф n…Ы any…Ы al…Ы dzyosu n…Ф shu.вАЭ

ref: Peter and the apostles replied: We don't obey people. We obey God.

ref: You killed Jesus by nailing him to a cross. But the God our ancestors worshiped raised him to life
text: B…Фl…Ф akaal…Ы Owusoso Akaa, y…Ыefeke Yesu…Ф eden…Ф bekpu…Ф m…Ы, an…Ф g…Ы n…Фkpiis…ФћГ n…Ы busi shu p…Ы noyii.

ref: and made him our Leader and Savior. Then God gave him a place at his right side, so that the people of Israel would turn back to him and be forgiven.
text: Owusoso Akaa akpii n…ЫititiћБ p…Ы al…Фk…Ф…Ы edzu y…Ы≈ЛaћГ m…Ы as…Ы Ekusi n…ЫћА an…Ф g…Ы ebe Bhui ban…Ф ebuћА as…Ы t…Ы ak…Ф Israelan…Ы etsyina etuћБ…Ф m…Ы, t…Ы bal…Фk…Ф bal…Ы ebui kpa etsye al…Ы.

ref: We are here to tell you about all this, and so is the Holy Spirit, who is God's gift to everyone who obeys God.

ref: When the council members heard this, they became so angry they wanted to kill the apostles.
text: G…Ы beluћГ kibui …Ыl…Ы, …Фm…Фp…Ф…Ы oyiћБ al…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bap…Ы as…Ы t…Ы beyi al…Ы.

ref: But one of the members was the Pharisee Gamaliel, a highly respected teacher. He ordered the apostles to be taken out of the room for a little while.
text: P…Ф Farisieyi teli g…Ы bezekulu as…Ы Gamaliel g…Ы edziћА …Фshad…Фkas…Ы p…Ы ban…Ф ad…Ыm…Ы n…Ы y…Ы…Ы, aba al…Ф…ЫtitiћБ n…Ы …ФhaeshesheћА…Ы nam…Ы k…Ыl…Ы ak…Ф …Фsha as…Ы bebuћА ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы eyin…Ф …Фt…ФћГ …Ыb…Ф…Ы.

ref: Then he said to the council: Men of Israel, be careful what you do with these men.
text: K…Ыl…Ы a…Ц…Ф etse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬIsraelan…Ы, no…Цi piapii n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы n…Ф…Фt…Ф…Ц…Ф …Фs…Ы t…Ы n…Фbh…Ыt…Ы n…ЫћА ban…Ф al…Ы shu m…Ф.

ref: Later, when the people of our nation were being counted, Judas from Galilee showed up. A lot of people followed him, but he was killed, and all his followers were scattered.
text: N…Ы yiede…Ы, Galilea eyiћА teli tsy…Ы g…Ы bezekulu as…Ы Yuda ebekoeyiћА, n…Ы ewui al…Ы m…Ы g…Ы bazakalaћА banun…Ф k…Ыl…Ы agbana ban…Ф kpekpeћА apl…Ыn…Ф y…Ыishu p…Ы bagaliћГ bat…ФћГ m…Ы. Beyii tsy…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы b…Фp…ФћГ…Ы yiede azazaћГ petee tsy…Ы akanaћА.

ref: So I advise you to stay away from these men. Leave them alone. If what they are planning is something of their own doing, it will fail.
text: Kliso…Ф kibui …Ыl…Ы otsi…Ы n…Ф, ihu buluhuћГ …Фk…Ф w…Фn…Ф …Фs…Ы, N…Фsh…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы ban…Ф al…Ы shu! N…Фk…Ф bagav…Ы! ∆Жm…Фs…Ы onup…Ы k…Ыg…Ы bat…Ф…Ц…Ф n…ЫћА bal…Ы ebui bh…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы m…Ы enu ban…Фdzyrame ay…Ы…Ы, lat…Ы bam…Ф otugbaћА v…Ыv…Ы.

ref: But if God is behind it, you cannot stop it anyway, unless you want to fight against God. The council members agreed with what he said,
text: P…Ф, onup…Ы Owusoso Akaa …Фk…Ф lede…Ы x…Фn…Ф…Ф, n…Фt…Ы b…ФlaћА …Фbh…Ыt…Ы …Фs…Ы ban…Ф al…Ы baz…Фk…Ф y…Фl…Ф e…Цi, p…Ф n…Фb…Фm…Ф w…Фn…Ф ishu …Фs…Ы n…Фg…Фl…ЫћГ iboe n…ЫћА Owusoso Akaa.вАЭ

ref: and they called the apostles back in. They had them beaten with a whip and warned them not to speak in the name of Jesus. Then they let them go.
text: Y…Ыibui …Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф k…Ф beluћГ ebui esi, kliso…Ф bekulu ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы amana k…Ыl…Ы bak…Ф behuisi al…Ы. K…Ыl…Ы bakp…Ы …Фsha ak…Ф al…Ы …Фs…Ы bat…Ы a…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф n…Ы Yesu y…Ыinye…Ы m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bash…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы bal…Ыishu p…Ы bash…Ы.

ref: The apostles left the council and were happy, because God had considered them worthy to suffer for the sake of Jesus.
text: Ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы ash…Ы n…Ы kebhu okuluk…Ф n…ЫћА same, …Фm…Фs…Ы bakalaћА bal…Ы as…Ы ban…Ф g…Ы bash…Фn…Ф as…Ы bam…Ф b…Фt…Ф n…ЫћА awuiћГ n…Ы Yesu y…Ыinye…Ы n…Ы takpu.

ref: Every day they spent time in the temple and in one home after another. They never stopped teaching and telling the good news that Jesus is the Messiah.
text: Keliza, elizaa m…Ы…Ы, ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы azaћГ b…Фd…ФћГ kakas…Ы nabha n…Ы akaavuћГ…Ф shu, n…ЫћА oden…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы …Фv…Ыn…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bag…Ы z…Фk…Ф y…Фl…Ф n…ЫћА bal…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ kakas…Ы n…ЫћА kibui gbangbaћГ t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф …Фs…Ы Yesu y…Ыenu Kristo…Ф.

ref: A lot of people were now becoming followers of the Lord. But some of the ones who spoke Greek started complaining about the ones who spoke Aramaic. They complained that the Greek-speaking widows were not given their share when the food supplies were handed out each day.
text: N…Ы ewui al…Ы m…Ы, g…Ы bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы t…ЫkaklaћА m…Ы zikpeћА t…Ф…Ц…Ф…Ф, Helan…Ы g…Ыenu Yudan…Ы g…ЫazaћГ bal…Ыishi…Ы bazakpam…Ы ishu n…Ы Hebrian…Ы g…Ыenu Yudan…Ы shu, …Фm…Фs…Ы beebhui Helan…Ы bav…Ыv…Ы edzyini al…Ы bho kibe nyia be n…Ы b…Ф≈Лa≈ЛaћГ tibubuћБ …Фk…Ф al…Ы m…Ы.

ref: The twelve apostles called the whole group of followers together and said, вАЬWe should not give up preaching God's message in order to serve at tables.
text: Kliso ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы l…Фf…Ф n…ЫћА taabha ekulu bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы petee eshogoћА p…Ы betse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬK…Ыma …Ыl…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф …Фs…Ы b…Фsh…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы Owusoso Akaa ebui…Ы t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф shu, t…ЫћА buzi…Цi b…Ф≈Лa≈ЛaћГ t…Ыk…Фk…Ф an…Ф ebui shu.

ref: My friends, choose seven men who are respected and wise and filled with God's Spirit. We will put them in charge of these things.
text: Kliso, m…Ыadzya al…Ы m…Ф, nobu bany…Ы tegegene n…Ы w…Фn…Ф…Ыshi g…Ы nonyi …Фs…Ы, ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ n…ЫћА bubutiћА kpas…Ы al…Ы m…Ы, b…ФbaћА l…Фk…Ф k…Ыx…ФћГ…Ы …Ыl…Ы kp…Ы ah…Ф…Ы …Фk…Ф al…Ы

ref: We can spend our time praying and serving God by preaching.вАЭ
text: t…Ы k…Ыk…Ф b…Фm…Ф kibeћА …Фk…Ф Owusoso Akaa tikukulu n…ЫћА y…Ыibui…Ы t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф.вАЭ

ref: This suggestion pleased everyone, and they began by choosing Stephen. He had great faith and was filled with the Holy Spirit. Then they chose Philip, Prochorus, Nicanor, Timon, Parmenas, and also Nicolaus, who worshiped with the Jewish people in Antioch.
text: K…Ыzaa pete ad…Ыm…Ы at…Ф…Ц…Ф kibui …Ыl…Ы g…Ы bakp…Ы amana nabha. Bebu Stefano, an…Ф g…Ы t…Ыy…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ n…ЫћА ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ oyuku y…Ы m…Ы n…ЫћА Filipo, Prokoro, Nikanora, Timona, Parmena n…ЫћА Nikanao, an…Ф g…Ы akp…Ы takpu esi ak…Ф ibudi p…Ы ebetsyina edzi Yudaeyi g…Ы ede Antioxia.

ref: These men were brought to the apostles. Then the apostles prayed and placed their hands on the men to show they had been chosen to do this work.
text: Bebu ban…Ф al…Ы akas…Ы ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bekulu Owusoso Akaa p…Ы bat…Ф…Ц…Ф bal…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы bal…Ы abha.

ref: God's message spread, and many more people in Jerusalem became followers. Even a large number of priests put their faith in the Lord. Stephen Is Arrested
text: Kidzo …Ыl…Ы nabha Owusoso Akaa ibui…Ы y…Ы…Ыv…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы n…Ы Yerusalem bezekpeћА at…Ф…Ц…Ф ziazia, k…Ыl…Ы ban…ФluћГazazaћГ kpekpeћА teli ebeluћГ bat…Ф esi ak…Ф t…Ыy…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ. Stefano TivuvuћГ

ref: God gave Stephen the power to work great miracles and wonders among the people.
text: Stefano an…Ф g…Ы Owusoso Akaa tibhui bhuibu n…ЫћА ohumi …ФzaћГ y…Ыm…Ы, abh…Ыt…Ы atsyindzye ebui n…ЫћА ebui g…Ы labh…Ыt…Ы ibiћА n…Ы banun…Ф n…Ыishi bam…Ф.

ref: But some men from Cyrene and Alexandria were members of a group who called themselves вАЬFree Men.вАЭ They started arguing with Stephen. Some others from Cilicia and Asia also argued with him.
text: P…Ф kititiћА l…Фl…Ф babaћБ, oden…Ф …Фtsy…Фak…Ф banun…Ф g…Ы bam…Ф ishuah…Ф…Ыm…Ы zazaћГa, g…Ыenu Yudan…Ы g…Ыede Kirene n…ЫћА Aleksandro, k…Ыl…Ы beteli tsy…Ы ede Kilikia n…ЫћА Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы. Ban…Ф al…Ы akpaћА ebui wl…Фak…Ы n…ЫћА Stefano,

ref: But they were no match for Stephen, who spoke with the great wisdom that the Spirit gave him.
text: p…Ф, bag…Ы lazaћГ y…ЫubutiћА n…ЫћА ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa n…Ф g…Ы …Фl…Ы y…Ыal…Фk…Ф aza…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф nuluћГ.

ref: So they talked some men into saying, вАЬWe heard Stephen say terrible things against Moses and God!вАЭ
text: Kliso n…Ы tikpukpuћГ m…Ы…Ы, baw…Ф…Ы ban…Ф teli uluћГ as…Ы ba…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬBuluћГ Stefano y…Ыa…Ц…Ф ebuso ebui n…Ы Mose n…ЫћА Owusoso Akaa shu.вАЭ

ref: They turned the people and their leaders and the teachers of the Law of Moses against Stephen. Then they all grabbed him and dragged him in front of the council.
text: Kliso ba…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф etsuifuћБ akp…Ы …Фma b…Фn…Ф beshesheћА…Ы n…ЫћА …Фshad…Фkas…Ы m…Ы. BevuћГ Stefano k…Ыl…Ы bagbana y…Ыamana ∆ЖhaeshesheћА…Ы …Фk…Ф.

ref: Some men agreed to tell lies about Stephen, and they said, вАЬThis man keeps on saying terrible things about this holy temple and the Law of Moses.
text: Ba…Ц…Ф as…Ыn…Ы ebui n…Ыishu as…Ы, вАЬAny…Ы al…Ы at…Ы ay…Фl…ФћА ebui kpa t…Ы…Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф n…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф dadal…Ы …Фl…Ы n…ЫћА …Фshaa shu.

ref: We have heard him claim that Jesus from Nazareth will destroy this place and change the customs Moses gave us.вАЭ
text: ∆Жm…Фs…Ы buluћГ y…Ыa…Ц…Ф as…Ы Yesu Nazareteyi al…Ы abay…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф …Фl…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы ebetsyina …Ыk…Ф…Ф g…Ы Mose akp…Ы elu…Ф ak…Ф …Фl…Ф.вАЭ

ref: Then all the council members stared at Stephen. They saw that his face looked like the face of an angel.
text: ∆Жham…ЫeshesheћА…Ы g…Ы bazaћГ …Ыk…Ыl…Ы petee edzu awuhuћГ n…Ы y…Ыabha, k…Ыl…Ы bam…Ф as…Ы yam…Ы edziћА as…Ы ax…ФћГ…Ыd…Ы ay…Ы m…ЫћА ana.

ref: The high priest asked Stephen, вАЬAre they telling the truth about you?вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы …ФzaћГk…Фan…Ф gbagbla ebisi y…Ыas…Ы, вАЬEbui al…Ы g…Ы bal…Фk…Ф ebhui w…ФluћГ…Ф n…Ф enu ebui gbaћГ dza?вАЭ

ref: Stephen answered: Friends, listen to me. Our glorious God appeared to our ancestor Abraham while he was still in Mesopotamia, before he had moved to Haran.
text: Ebu kibui …Ыl…Ы uluћГ as…Ы, вАЬM…Ыadzya al…Ы, n…Ы m…Ыakaa al…Ы, n…Фtaat…Ф n…Ы m…Ы! N…Ы kibe …Ыl…Ы g…Ы b…Фl…Ф ashuiћГ Abraham azaћГ Mesopotamia n…Ф, Owusoso Akaa Ishudadal…Ы elete…Ы ebu y…Ыishu akas…Ы y…Ы n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы flogo p…Ы Abraham ebetuћБ av…Ы Xaram.

ref: God told him, вАЬLeave your country and your relatives and go to a land that I will show you.вАЭ
text: Owusoso Akaa a…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАШTu …Фsh…Ы n…Ы w…Ф kesiakpa, n…ЫћА w…Ф eshopo al…Ы …Фbha t…Ы …Фv…Ы kesiakpa g…Ы …Ыbakas…Ы w…Ф nabha.вАЩ

ref: Then Abraham left the land of the Chaldeans and settled in Haran. After his father died, Abraham came and settled in this land where you now live.
text: Kliso etuћБ ash…Ы n…Ы Kaldea kesiakpa nabha p…Ы ad…ЫzaћГ Xaram. N…Ы y…Ыakaa butsi niede…Ы, Owusoso Akaa as…Ыsii n…Ы kesiakpa al…Ы abha g…Ы n…Фl…Ы otsi…Ы n…Ф.

ref: God didn't give him any part of it, not even a square meter. But God did promise to give it to him and his family forever, even though Abraham didn't have any children.
text: Ag…Ы k…Ф…Ы ka≈ЛaћГsi nanaћА n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы p…Ы oboyi kesiakpa kal…Ы kats…Ы…Ц…Ыkp…Ф tidzedze m…Ы ete tsy…Ы. P…Ф Owusoso Akaa at…Ф…Ц…Ф ak…Ф…Ы as…Ы, y…Ы n…ЫћА y…Ыeshui al…Ы abay…Ыk…Ы kesiakpa al…Ы n…Ы kibe …Ыl…Ы tsy…Ы, eyi nanaћА ag…ЫzaћГ Abraham ah…Ф…Ы flogo.

ref: God said Abraham's descendants would live for a while in a foreign land. There they would be slaves and would be mistreated

ref: These men have risked their lives for our Lord Jesus Christ.

ref: We are also sending Judas and Silas, who will tell you in person the same things that we are writing.
text: Kliso…Ф b…Фkp…Ы Yuda n…ЫћА Sila n…Ы w…Фn…Ф …Фk…Ф t…ЫћА babaћА …Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф at…Ф…Ц…Ф k…Ыklagbu n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы …Ыl…Ы ishu b…Фf…Фn…Ф keplukpa al…Ы ak…Ф w…Фn…Ф.

ref: The Holy Spirit has shown us that we should not place any extra burden on you.
text: K…Ыp…ЫћГ …Фk…Ф ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ n…ЫћА b…Фl…Ф t…Ы b…Фt…Ы t…Ф…Ц…Ф w…Фn…Ф kituku nanaћА g…Ыd…Ы ebui al…Ы g…Ы b…Фba tse…Цe w…Фn…Ф.

ref: But you should not eat anything offered to idols. You should not eat any meat that still has the blood in it or any meat of any animal that has been strangled. You must also not commit any terrible sexual sins. If you follow these instructions, you will do well. We send our best wishes.
text: Nobu ishu oyin…Ф oden…Ф b…Ф≈Лa≈ЛaћГ g…Ы bat…Ф ak…Ф ibudi…Ы, dzyosu n…ЫћА b…Фdzya g…Ыide bagaћГ g…Ы bedzyiniћА bal…Ы ili…Ы m…Ы, …Фl…Фk…Ф …Фpl…Ыn…Ф k…Ыg…Фl…Ф ≈Лa≈ЛaћГ. N…Фkp…Ы kemi t…ЫћА n…Фsh…Ыn…Ы ah…Ф…Ы n…Ы ebui al…Ы n…Ыidi shu. B…Фs…Ыn…Ф w…Фn…Ф piapii.

ref: The four men left Jerusalem and went to Antioch. Then they called the church members together and gave them the letter.
text: Bakp…Ы ban…Ф n…Ф n…Ыidzo p…Ы bash…Ы av…Ы Antioxia. ∆Рk…Ыl…Ы, bedishogoћА …Фha p…Ы bal…Фk…Ф keplukpa ak…Ф al…Ы.

ref: Judas and Silas were prophets, and they spoke a long time, encouraging and helping the Lord's followers.

ref: The men from Jerusalem stayed on in Antioch for a while. And when they left to return to the ones who had sent them, the followers wished them well.
text: G…Ы baza …Ыk…Ыl…Ы n…Ы ewui teli ede…Ы, …Фha …Фkp…Ы bal…Ы kidzo betsyina ash…Ы n…ЫћА tiyuyulaћА n…ЫћА ishu y…Фy…Ф …Фs…Ыs…Ы bag…Ы akp…Ы bal…Ы …Фk…Ф.

ref: But Paul and Barnabas stayed on in Antioch, where they and many others taught and preached about the Lord. Paul and Barnabas Go Their Separate Ways
text: Paulo n…ЫћА Barnaba x…Фn…Ф aw…Ф Antioxia, …Ыk…Ыl…Ы bal…Ы n…ЫћА banun…Ф teli azakas…Ы b…Фd…ФћГ p…Ы baza…Ц…Ф Apalete nibui…Ы. Kawl…ФћГak…Ы Eku Paulo N…ЫћА Barnaba ∆Рshi

ref: Sometime later Paul said to Barnabas, вАЬLet's go back and visit the Lord's followers in the cities where we preached his message. Then we will know how they are doing.вАЭ

ref: Barnabas wanted to take along John, whose other name was Mark.
text: Barnaba ap…Ы as…Ы t…Ы agbana Yohanes, g…Ы bezekulu tsy…Ы as…Ы Marko…Ф av…Ы apl…Ыn…Ф al…Ы,

ref: But Paul did not want to, because Mark had left them in Pamphylia and had stopped working with them.
text: P…Ф kigiku Paulo x…Фn…Ф awaћГ ana, …Фm…Фs…Ы at…Ы sh…Ыn…Ы …Фh…Ф…Ы n…Ы bal…Ы ishu elu e…Цi n…Ы Pamfilia k…Ыl…Ы, agav…Ы …Ыl…Ы abha aw…Фa ax…ФћГ…Ы n…Ы al…Ы.

ref: Paul and Barnabas argued, then each of them went his own way. Barnabas took Mark and sailed to Cyprus,
text: Kibui …Ыl…Ы k…Ф kawl…ФћГak…Ы nyagaћГa eku Paulo n…ЫћА Barnaba ishi, k…Ыk…Ф …Фs…Ы bebu …Фt…Ф n…Ы bag…Фl…Ф shu. Barnaba agbana Marko apl…Ыn…Ф y…Ыishu k…Ыl…Ы beku keliћГabhaohu av…Ы Kipro.

ref: but Paul took Silas and left after the followers had placed them in God's care.
text: Paulo x…Фn…Ф ebu Sila apl…Ыn…Ф y…Ыishu, k…Ыl…Ы g…Ы …Фha al…Фk…Ф bal…Ы akp…Ы ah…Ф…Ы ak…Ф Apalete…Ы as…Ы ebhui bal…Ы ebu…Ф, bat…Фn…Ф kidzo ash…Ы.

ref: They traveled through Syria and Cilicia, encouraging the churches.
text: AgaћГ ekoeyiћА n…Ы Siria n…ЫћА Kilikia p…Ы azakp…Ы …Фham…Ыan…Ы ohumi.

ref: Paul and Silas went back to Derbe and Lystra, where there was a follower named Timothy. His mother was also a follower. She was Jewish, and his father was Greek.
text: Paulo agaћГ edikoeyi n…Ы Derbe n…ЫћА Listra, …Ыk…Ыl…Ы ad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы teli g…Ы bezekulu as…Ы Timoteo azaћГ, an…Ф g…Ы y…ЫeliћГ enu Yudadzi n…ЫћА an…Ф g…Ы ay…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ, p…Ф y…Ыakaa edzi Helan…Ф.

ref: The Lord's followers in Lystra and Iconium said good things about Timothy,
text: Badzya n…Ы Listra n…ЫћА Ikonio n…Ф ba…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф gbangbaћГ n…Ы Timoteo shu.

ref: and Paul wanted him to go with them. But Paul first had him circumcised, because all the Jewish people around there knew that Timothy's father was Greek.
text: Paulo ap…Ы as…Ы t…Ы agbana y…Ы evun…Ф so…Ф, ebhui k…Ыh…ФћГa ak…Ф…Ы n…Ы Yudan…Ы g…Ы bal…Ы kibeћБ …Ыl…Ы shu so, …Фm…Фs…Ы bal…Ы petee enyi as…Ы y…Ыakaa enu Helaeyi.

ref: As Paul and the others went from city to city, they told the followers what the apostles and leaders in Jerusalem had decided, and they urged them to follow these instructions.
text: G…Ы bazagaћГ afala n…Ы …Ыmaa m…Ы…Ы, baa…Ц…Ф kibui…Ы g…Ы ban…Фkp…Ыkp…Ы n…ЫћА besheshe…Ы a…Ц…Ф n…Ы Yerusalem etse…Цe al…Ы t…Ы baabh…Ыt…Ы t…Ф…Ц…Ф k…Ыl…Ы abha.

ref: The churches became stronger in their faith, and each day more people put their faith in the Lord. Paul's Vision in Troas
text: Kliso bak…Ф …Фhaa am…Ф ohumi n…Ы bal…Ы t…Ыy…Ыy…Ыk…Ы≈ЛaћГ m…Ы k…Ыl…Ы bal…Ы t…ЫkaklaћА m…Ы zikpeћА t…Ф…Ц…Ф kibe nyia be. Paulo B…Фlala G…Ыaza N…Ы Any…Ы G…Ыaza Makedonia Shu

ref: Paul and his friends went through Phrygia and Galatia, but the Holy Spirit would not let them preach in Asia.
text: Paulo n…ЫћА y…Ы…Фbhia al…Ы azagaћГ kidzo fala n…Ы Frigia n…ЫћА Galatia, p…Ф ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa GbangbaћГ g…Ыk…Ф bal…Ы kidzo as…Ы ba…Ц…Ф kibui gbangbaћГ n…Ы Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы.

ref: After they arrived in Mysia, they tried to go into Bithynia, but the Spirit of Jesus would not let them.
text: G…Ы bediku Misia buboћА nabhaa, bap…Ы as…Ы etsoku Bitania, p…Ф Yesu ∆Жf…ФfuiћГa n…Ф …Фg…Ыk…Ф bal…Ы kidzo ana.

ref: So they went on through Mysia until they came to Troas.
text: Kliso bagafala n…Ы Misia p…Ы bav…Ы Troa.

ref: During the night, Paul had a vision of someone from Macedonia who was standing there and begging him, вАЬCome over to Macedonia and help us!вАЭ
text: N…Ы elishi al…Ы bebu k…Ыd…ФћГ akas…Ы Paulo n…Ы any…Ы teli g…Ы al…Ы Makedonia g…Ы eli kititiћБ p…Ы ebisi y…Ы…Фd…Ф as…Ы, вАЬTsak…Ы ba Makedonia t…ЫћА …Фb…Фpl…Ыn…Ф …Фl…Ф.вАЭ

ref: After Paul had seen the vision, we began looking for a way to go to Macedonia. We were sure that God had called us to preach the good news there. Lydia Becomes a Follower of the Lord
text: G…Ы bebu ebui al…Ы akas…Ы Paulo ebeke…Ы, b…Фbal…Ы tsi…Ф …Фl…Ы k…Ыl…Ы b…Фv…Ы Makedonia, b…Фy…Ыk…Ы k…Ыl…Ы …Фs…Ы Owusoso Akaa y…Ыekulu b…Фl…Ф …Фs…Ы b…Фd…Ы…Ц…Ф kibui gbangbaћГ …Фk…Ф al…Ы. Lidia Y…Ы Titsyitsyina N…Ы Filipia

ref: We sailed straight from Troas to Samothrace, and the next day we arrived in Neapolis.
text: Den…Ф Troa n…Ф buku keliћГabhaohu k…Ыl…Ы b…Фtsak…Ы tiћГi v…Ы Samotrake, k…Ыl…Ы n…Ы kelizaza m…Ы…Ы, b…Фsh…Ы v…Ы Neapoli.

ref: From there we went to Philippi, which is a Roman colony in the first district of Macedonia. We spent several days in Philippi.
text: Den…Ф …Ыk…Ыl…Ы b…ФgaћГ kidzo …Фv…Ы Filipi g…Ыenu Roman…Ы kesiakpa abha …Фma gbagbla …Фd…Ы n…Ы Makedonia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы. K…Ыl…Ы b…ФzaћГ …Ыk…Ыl…Ы ewui gelee.

ref: Then on the Sabbath we went outside the city gate to a place by the river, where we thought there would be a Jewish meeting place for prayer. We sat down and talked with the women who came.
text: N…Ы Kimoelewui nabhaa, b…Фv…Ы …Фmaa niede…Ы n…Ы keliћГ tieli shu, t…Ы b…Фd…Ы p…Ы…Ы …Фk…Ф toli …Фk…Ф Owusoso Akaa tikukulu. B…ФzaћГ kesi k…Ыl…Ы b…Фkpa ka…Ц…Ф …Ц…Фtse…Цe badz…Ы g…Ы eshogoћА n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы.

ref: One of them was Lydia, who was from the city of Thyatira and sold expensive purple cloth. She was a worshiper of the Lord God, and he made her willing to accept what Paul was saying.
text: Bal…Ы …Фmay…Ыm…Ы tenikpo g…Ы azataat…ФћГ n…Ы …Фl…Ф y…Ыenu Lidia, an…Ф g…Ы azad…Ы ap…Фt…Ы g…Ы lay…Ыk…Ы kedziћА, p…Ы ehoeyi azaћГ y…Ыah…Ф…Ы p…Ы ede Tiatira p…Ы enu an…Ф g…Ы akp…Ы k…Ыtakpu esi ak…Ф Owusoso Akaa. Apalete…Ы adal…Ы y…Ы kituћБ…Ф m…Ы …Фs…Ы t…ЫћА ay…Ыk…Ы Paulo ebui g…Ы amana.

ref: Then after she and her family were baptized, she kept on begging us, вАЬIf you think I really do have faith in the Lord, come stay in my home.вАЭ Finally, we accepted her invitation. Paul and Silas Are Put in Jail
text: G…Ы bakp…Ы buliћГ ak…Ф y…Ы n…Ы y…Ы…ФpaћГ m…Ы an…Ы, ay…Ыk…Ы b…Фl…Ф akp…Ы y…Ы…ФpaћГ m…Ы. A…Ц…Ф as…Ы вАЬOnup…Ы n…Фd…Ыm…Ы …Фs…Ы inu an…Ф g…Ы ay…Ыk…Ы Apalete nabha a≈ЛaћГa, k…Ыl…Ы n…Фba t…Ы n…Фb…ФzaћГ m…Ы b…ФpaћГ m…Ы.вАЭ K…Ыl…Ы ebu ebui m…Ы ak…Ф b…Фl…Ф. Bakp…Ы Paulo N…ЫћА Sila N…Ы ∆Ж…ЦavuћГm…Ы

ref: One day on our way to the place of prayer, we were met by a slave girl. She had a spirit in her that gave her the power to tell the future. By doing this she made a lot of money for her owners.
text: Kiwui tinikpo g…Ы b…Фv…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы g…Ы bukulu Owusoso Akaa, b…Фtsyana adz…Ыnuv…Ф…Ы dzidzi teli g…Ы …Фf…ФfuiћГa toli …ФzaћГy…Ыah…Ф…Ы g…Ы aza…Ц…Ф ebui g…Ы laba …Ыl…Ы m…Ы kidegba. Am…Ф ehoeyi kpekpeћА ak…Ф y…Ыapalete al…Ы n…Ы y…Ы kebisiћА…Ы shu.

ref: The girl followed Paul and the rest of us, and she kept yelling, вАЬThese men are servants of the Most High God! They are telling you how to be saved.вАЭ
text: Adz…Ыnuv…Ф…Ы n…Ф at…Фn…Ф Paulo n…ЫћА b…Фl…Ф bag…Фg…Ф…Ф p…Ы akp…Ы oziћГ as…Ы, вАЬBany…Ы al…Ы enu Kititiay…Ы Gbagbla y…Ыax…ФћГ…Ыd…Ы, g…Ы etse…Цe w…Фn…Ф kidzo n…Фn…Ф abha g…Ы baba y…Ыk…Ы w…Фn…Ф eluћБ …ЫkpaћГ.вАЭ

ref: This went on for several days. Finally, Paul got so upset that he turned and said to the spirit, вАЬIn the name of Jesus Christ, I order you to leave this girl alone!вАЭ At once the evil spirit left her.
text: AzaћГ kibui …Ыl…Ы abha n…Ы ewui gelee m…ЫћА. Kidegba k…Ыbad…Ы Paulo uluћГ k…Ыl…Ы etsyina k…Ыl…Ы etse…Цe …Фf…ФfuiћГa n…Ф as…Ы, вАЬN…Ы Yesu Kristo kinye m…Ы…Ы, …Ыkp…Ы …Фsha ak…Фw…Ф …Фs…Ы t…Ы okoeyi n…Ы adz…Ыnuv…Ф…Ы n…Ф m…Ы!вАЭ Tsi…ФћГ …Фl…Ы ko…Ф, …Фf…ФfuiћГa n…Ф koeyi n…Ы adz…Ыnuv…Ф…Ы n…Ф m…Ы.

ref: When the girl's owners realized they had lost all chances for making more money, they grabbed Paul and Silas and dragged them into court.
text: Kibe…Ы g…Ы adz…Ыnuv…Ф…Ы dzidziћА al…Ы y…Ыapalete al…Ы am…Ф as…Ы, …Ыk…Ыl…Ы g…Ы bagaћГ am…Ф ehoeyi…Ы oziћГ…Ы…Ы, bevuћГ Paulo n…ЫћА Sila av…Ыn…Ф bal…Ы kedzi…Ы m…Ы t…ЫћА bad…Ыtsy…Фa n…ЫћА …Фshaelete…Ы.

ref: They told the officials, вАЬThese Jews are upsetting our city!
text: Bagbana bal…Ы amana bebhukulu nam…Ы p…Ы aba…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬBan…Ф al…Ы enu Yudan…Ы k…Ыl…Ы bamana buluhuћГ n…Ы b…Фl…Ф …Фmam…Ы

ref: They are telling us to do things we Romans are not allowed to do.вАЭ
text: baba kas…Ы …Фsha tili g…Ыma …Ыl…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф …Фk…Ф b…Фl…Ф Roman…Ы t…Ы b…Фbh…Ыt…Ы …Ыl…Ы abha.вАЭ

ref: The crowd joined in the attack on Paul and Silas. Then the officials tore the clothes off the two men and ordered them to be beaten with a whip.
text: Ban…Ф…Ыza tapl…Ыn…Ф al…Ы n…Ы kititiћА l…Фl…Ф …Ыl…Ы n…Ы Paulo n…ЫћА sila shu, k…Ыl…Ы bebhukulu…Ф ak…Ф …Фsha …Фs…Ы bebuћБ b…Фd…ФћГ kp…Ыkp…Ы n…Ы bal…Ыishu t…Ы behuisi al…Ы.

ref: After they had been badly beaten, they were put in jail, and the jailer was told to guard them carefully.
text: G…Ы behuisi al…Ы …Ц…Фt…Ф …Ц…Фt…Ф ebeke…Ы, bakp…Ы al…Ы n…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГ m…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы ag…Ы ebuћБ bal…Ы k…Ыp…Ф akp…Ы …Фsha ak…Ф …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф abha e…Цi…Цielete…Ы as…Ы t…Ы belu aw…ФћГ n…ЫћА al…Ы piapii.

ref: The jailer did as he was told. He put them deep inside the jail and chained their feet to heavy blocks of wood.
text: G…Ы bay…Ыk…Ы …Фshak…Фk…Ф …Фl…Ы ebekeћА…Ы, bakp…Ы al…Ы n…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф n…Ыishit…ЫbhaћА k…Ыl…Ы bash…Ф bal…Ы …Ыts…Ы…Ц…Ы kp…Ы isi tili m…Ы g…Ы bebu iziћГ akp…Ы…Ы.

ref: About midnight Paul and Silas were praying and singing praises to God, while the other prisoners listened.
text: N…Ы elishi teti…Ы Paulo n…ЫћА Sila bezekulu Owusoso Akaa p…Ы baazhaћГ …Ыdz…Ы ak…Ф…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГm…Ы azazaћГ g…Фg…Ф…Ы n…Ф aza taat…ФћГ n…Ы al…Ы.

ref: Suddenly a strong earthquake shook the jail to its foundations. The doors opened, and the chains fell from all the prisoners.
text: N…Ы bal…Ы matiћА matiћА m…Ы…Ы, kesiakpa ebeshukuћА gagaliћГi ak…Ф as…Ы …Ф…Цavu…Ф itsuru n…Ф tsy…Ы bashukuћА. Odunu …Фl…Ф ko…Ф …Ф…ЦavuћГ…Ф buduluћГ…Ф petee badal…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы aka nyia aka y…Ы…Цahui…Ы boele.

ref: When the jailer woke up and saw that the doors were open, he thought that the prisoners had escaped. He pulled out his sword and was about to kill himself.
text: ∆Ж…ЦavuћГ abha e…Цi…Цi elete…Ы aba ny…Ыm…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы g…Ы am…Ф as…Ы …Ф…ЦavuћГ duluћГ…Ф dal…Ы li…Ы, etso y…Ы b…Ыt…Ы as…Ы t…ЫћА eyiћА y…Ыishu …Фm…Фs…Ы e…Цi as…Ы …Ф…ЦuvuћГazazaћГ ebu t…Ыts…Ы…Ц…Ыm…Ы ash…Ы.

ref: But Paul shouted, вАЬDon't harm yourself! No one has escaped.вАЭ
text: P…Ф Paulo abakp…Ы oziћГ as…Ы, вАЬT…Ыkp…Ы ishu kibiћА! B…Фl…Ф pete l…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы.

ref: The jailer asked for a torch and went into the jail. He was shaking all over as he knelt down in front of Paul and Silas.
text: ∆Ж…ЦavuћГ abha e…Цi…Цielete…Ы ebisi as…Ы bamana efuћБ, k…Ыl…Ы abh…Ыt…Ы zia v…Ы edi zhi ekumu p…Ы eshuku gbagbaћА n…Ы Paulo n…ЫћА Sila otugbaћА.

ref: After he had led them out of the jail, he asked, вАЬWhat must I do to be saved?вАЭ
text: K…Ыl…Ы Agbana bal…Ы eyin…Ф p…Ы ebisi bal…Ы as…Ы, вАЬBapalete, k…Ыl…Ы m…Ыbabh…Ыt…Ы p…Ы …Ыba m…Ф …ЫkpaћГ?вАЭ

ref: They replied, вАЬHave faith in the Lord Jesus and you will be saved! This is also true for everyone who lives in your home.вАЭ
text: BebuiliuluћГ as…Ы, вАЬY…Ыk…Ы Apalete Yesu abha …Ф≈ЛaћГ k…Ыl…Ы …Фb…Ф m…Ф …ЫkpaћГ, w…Ф n…ЫћА w…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы an…Ы.вАЭ

ref: Then Paul and Silas told him and everyone else in his house about the Lord.
text: K…Ыl…Ы ba…Ц…Ф Apalete n…Ыibui…Ы etse…Цe y…Ы n…ЫћА ban…Ф g…Фg…Ф…Ы n…Ф n…ЫћА y…Ы b…ФpaћГ m…Ы.

ref: While it was still night, the jailer took them to a place where he could wash their cuts and bruises. Then he and everyone in his home were baptized.

ref: This God made the world and everything in it. He is Lord of heaven and earth, and he doesn't live in temples built by human hands.

ref: He doesn't need help from anyone. He gives life, breath, and everything else to all people.

ref: God has done all this, so that we will look for him and reach out and find him. He isn't far from any of us,

ref: and he gives us the power to live, to move, and to be who we are. вАЬWe are his children,вАЭ just as some of your poets have said.
text: As…Ы kana g…Ы bag…Ы bafat…Ы …Ыdz…Ы n…Ы w…Фn…Ф …Ыshi…Ы a…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАШ∆Жm…Фs…Ы y…Ыm…Ы b…Фl…Ы n…ЫћА …ЫkpaћГ p…Ы b…ФfalaћА p…Ы b…Фl…Ы ishu ah…Ф…Ы m…Ы.вАЩ вАШY…Ыm…Ы bude koeyiћА.вАЩ

ref: Since we are God's children, we must not think that he is like an idol made out of gold or silver or stone. He isn't like anything that humans have thought up and made.

ref: In the past, God forgave all this because people did not know what they were doing. But now he says that everyone everywhere must turn to him.

ref: He has set a day when he will judge the world's people with fairness. And he has chosen the man Jesus to do the judging for him. God has given proof of this to all of us by raising Jesus from death.
text: ∆Жm…Фs…Ы at…Ф…Ц…Ф kiwui…Ы g…Ы ebekulu kebhu n…ЫћА kan…Ф n…ФћА m…Ы petee n…ЫћА kebhu…Ф g…Ы kal…Ы al…Ы …ФzaћГk…Ф …Фgana anun…Ф g…Ы y…Ыabha y…Ыat…Ф…Ц…Ф ah…Ф…Ы. Ebu kibui …Ыl…Ы akas…Ы banun…Ф petee …Фgana y…Ы tifefeke oden…Ф bekpu…Ф m…Ы shu.вАЭ

ref: As soon as the people heard Paul say a man had been raised from death, some of them started laughing. Others said, вАЬWe will hear you talk about this some other time.вАЭ

text: Ban…Ф kasasaћА tieli g…Ыedzi behuin…Ы tsy…Ы al…Фk…Ф bal…Ы ihui…Ы amana p…Ы bap…Ф…Ы …Ыl…Ы n…Ы …Фma…Ыshi. G…Ы bakalaћА ehoeyi…Ы g…Ы beziћГ n…Ы bal…Ы akp…Ыn…Ы ebui bh…Ыbh…Ыt…Ы shu…Ф, labanaћА sikaћГfufu ihotu af…Ыeti, g…Ыenu ehoeyi g…Ы lav…Ы otugbaћА n…Ы kibeћА …Ыl…Ы.

ref: So the Lord's message spread and became even more powerful. The Riot in Ephesus
text: N…Ы kidzo …Ыl…Ы nabha Apalete…Ы n…Ыibui…Ы y…Ы…Ыv…ЫћА p…Ы k…Ыv…ЫћА kabha n…ЫћА ohumi.

ref: After all this had happened, Paul decided to visit Macedonia and Achaia on his way to Jerusalem. Paul had said, вАЬFrom there I will go on to Rome.вАЭ
text: G…Ы al…Ы ny…ФћГ…Ф aba …Ыl…Ы m…Ы ebeke…Ы, Paulo abat…Ф…Ц…Ф …Ыl…Ы …Фs…Ы t…Ы ad…ЫgaћГ Makedonia n…ЫћА Axaya t…Ы av…Ы Yerusalem. A…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬOnup…Ы …Ыd…Ы Yerusalem aba ko…Ф, …Ыbadi…Цi Roma tsy…Ы.

ref: So he sent his two helpers, Timothy and Erastus, to Macedonia. But he stayed on in Asia for a while.
text: As…Ыs…Ы y…Ыax…ФћГ…Ыd…Ы taabha g…Ыenu Timoteo n…ЫћА Erasto n…Ы Makedonia, g…Ы y…Ыx…Фn…Ф azaћГ Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы k…Ыb…Ф…Ы. KititiћА L…Фl…Ф Ebui…Ы Gaba Efeso…Ф

ref: At that time there was serious trouble because of the Lord's Way.
text: N…Ы kibeћА …Ыl…Ы kititiћА l…Фl…Ф tili babaћА n…Ы Kidzo…Ф shu.

ref: A silversmith named Demetrius had a business that made silver models of the temple of the goddess Artemis. Those who worked for him earned a lot of money.
text: Any…Ы teli g…Ыedzi sikaћГfufu ax…ФћГ…Ыw…Фa g…Ы bezekulu y…Ыas…Ы Demetrio, azabh…Ыt…Ы sikaћГfufu ibudiuvuћГ…Ф …Фl…Ы t…ЫzazaћГ m…Ы g…Ы bekulu as…Ы Artemis, p…Ы amana ax…ФћГ…Ы w…Фaw…Фa ak…Ф ban…Ф gelee.

ref: Demetrius brought together everyone who was in the same business and said: Friends, you know we make a good living at this.
text: Ekulu bal…Ы eshogoћА apl…Ыn…Ф bax…ФћГ…Ыw…Фa bhlat…Ф g…Ы baw…Фa ax…ФћГ…Ы al…Ы n…Ыidi p…Ы etse…Цe bal…Ы as…Ы, вАЬM…Ыadzya al…Ы m…Ф, n…Фonyi …Фs…Ы b…Ф…Фm…Ф ehoeyi piapii oden…Ф k…Ыx…ФћГ…Ы …Ыl…Ы w…Фaw…Фa m…Ы.

ref: But you have surely seen and heard how this man Paul is upsetting a lot of people, not only in Ephesus, but almost everywhere in Asia. He claims that the gods we humans make are not really gods at all.
text: K…Ыl…Ы n…Фm…ФћА p…Ы n…ФoluћГ kana g…Ы Paulo any…Ы al…Ы etsyina banun…Ф ekpe…Цekpe…Цe…Ы m…Ы, p…Ы agbana ban…ФkpekpeћА…Ы atsa…Цak…Ы idzo n…Ы Efoso…Ф n…ЫћА Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы petee tsy…Ы. A…Ц…Ф as…Ы ibudi…Ы g…Ы ban…Фdzyrame…Ы abh…Ыt…Ы tinu akaa nanaћА.

ref: Everyone will start saying terrible things about our business. They will stop respecting the temple of the goddess Artemis, who is worshiped in Asia and all over the world. Our great goddess will be forgotten!
text: Kibui …Ыl…Ы baziћГ b…Фd…ФћГ, g…Ыn…Ы …Фs…Ы b…Фl…Ф ax…ФћГ…Ы w…Фaw…Фa kinyeћА…Ы ete k…Ыl…Ы bayala, p…Ф bazakaћА kp…Ы k…Ыtakpu esi ak…Ф obidiuvuћГ…Ф Artemis gbagbla n…ЫћА y…ЫobudiukaћГ tsy…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы adz…Ыobudi…Ы tsy…Ы g…Ы bakp…Ы k…Ыtakpu esi ak…Ф n…Ы Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы n…ЫћА kan…Ф n…ФћА m…Ы petee tsy…Ы, y…Ыohumin…Ф obokoeyi n…Ы y…Ыah…Ф…Ы m…Ы.вАЭ

ref: When the workers heard this, they got angry and started shouting, вАЬGreat is Artemis, the goddess of the Ephesians!вАЭ
text: G…Ы beluћГ kibui …Ыl…Ы, …Фm…Фp…Ф…Ы oyial…Ы k…Ыl…Ы bakpaћА oziћГukp…ЫћА as…Ы, вАЬObudi gbagbla …Фl…ЫonuћА Efesoan…Ы Artemis.вАЭ

ref: Soon the whole city was in a riot, and some men grabbed Gaius and Aristarchus, who had come from Macedonia with Paul. Then everyone in the crowd rushed to the place where the town meetings were held.
text: Odunu …Фl…Ы ko…Ф, …Фmam…Ы oyukuћА n…ЫћА oziћГ. Banun…Ф evuћГ Gayo n…ЫћА Aristaxo g…Ы benu ban…Ф g…Ы bagaћГ kidzo …Фpl…Ыn…Ф Paulo oden…Ф Makedonia, k…Ыl…Ы bagbanaћА bal…Ы odunuћГ …Фl…Ы av…Ыn…Ф …Фma …Фl…Ы b…ФwufuћА …Фw…Фk…Ф.

ref: Paul wanted to go out and speak to the people, but the Lord's followers would not let him.
text: Paulo ap…Ы as…Ы t…ЫћА av…Ы ban…Ф…Ыza nam…Ы p…Ф y…Ыad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы ag…Ы k…Ф…Ы y…Ыidzo.

ref: A few of the local officials were friendly to Paul, and they sent someone to warn him not to go.
text: Ban…Ф hohoe…Ы g…Ыenu Paulo y…Ы…Фbhia al…Ы n…Ы k…Ыma …Ыl…Ы m…Ы tsy…Ы as…Ыs…Ы y…Ы …Фklas…ФћГ as…Ы at…Ыp…Ы k…Ыw…Фaw…Фa as…Ы av…Ы bal…Ы buwufuћА …Фw…Фk…Ф.

ref: Some of the people in the meeting were shouting one thing, and others were shouting something else. Everyone was completely confused, and most of them did not even know why they were there.
text: KazaћГ egetiћА k…Ыn…Фn…Ф g…Ы babaћА bh…Ыt…Ы…Ы, beteli akp…Ы oziћГ a…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф n…Ы kibui …Ыl…ЫћА shu, beteli tsy…Ы n…Ы k…Ыbhlat…Ф shu. Banun…Ф teli tsy…Ы etinyi k…Ыg…Ы k…Ыl…Ы sop…Ы bav…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы.

ref: Several of the Jewish leaders pushed a man named Alexander to the front of the crowd and started telling him what to say. He motioned with his hand and tried to explain what was going on.
text: Yudan…Ы etii Aleksandro av…Ыn…Ф otugbaћА, k…Ыl…Ы banun…Ф g…Ы ebeshogoћА…Ф teli akp…Ы oziћГ n…Ы y…Ыabha p…Ы bakas…Ы y…Ы k…Ыg…Ы k…Ыl…Ы …Фs…Ы abh…Ыt…Ы…Ы. Akas…Ы bal…Ы ah…Ф…Ы as…Ы t…ЫћА bataat…ФћГ t…ЫћА am…Ф kidzo ebuћБ y…Ыishu uluћГ n…Ы banun…Ф am…Ы.

ref: But when the crowd saw that he was Jewish, they all shouted for two hours, вАЬGreat is Artemis, the goddess of the Ephesians!вАЭ
text: P…Ф g…Ы bam…Ф as…Ы Yudaeyi y…Ыenu…Ф, bal…Ы petee akp…Ы oziћГ dzlolo kitsuћА as…Ы …Ф…ЦatataћБ t…Ыbha ana as…Ы, вАЬObudi gbagbla …Фl…Ыonu Efesoan…Ы Artemis!вАЭ

ref: Finally, a town official made the crowd be quiet. Then he said: People of Ephesus, who in the world doesn't know that our city is the center for worshiping the great goddess Artemis? Who doesn't know that her image which fell from heaven is right here?
text: An…Ф n…ФћА g…Ы y…Ыaf…Фn…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ ak…Ф k…Ыzaa ak…Фs…Ы bataat…ФћГ, p…Ы etse…Цe bal…Ы as…Ы, вАЬEfesoan…Ы m…Ф, banun…Ф petee n…Ы kan…Ф n…ФћА m…Ы etinyi as…Ы Efosoan…Ы balepoћА Artemis obudiukaћГ n…ЫћА …Фl…Ы t…ЫzazaћГ t…Ыfafat…Ы g…Ы w…Фl…Ы oden…Ф kititi…Ы.

ref: No one can deny this, and so you should calm down and not do anything foolish.
text: Kliso…Ф g…Ы ebui al…Ы enu ebui gbaћГa, k…Ыl…Ы …Фs…Ы n…Фtaat…ФћГ, t…ЫћА n…Фt…Ы b…Фbh…Ыt…Ы kibui nanaћА odunuћГ …Фl…Ы.

ref: You have brought men in here who have not robbed temples or spoken against our goddess.
text: N…ФgbanaћА bany…Ы al…Ы …Фmana …Ыk…Ыl…Ы g…Ы begi dezuru ibudiukaћГ m…Ы k…Ыd…ФћГ nanaћА alo p…Ы ba…Ц…Ф ebusoebui n…Ы b…Фl…Ф adz…Ыobudi…Ы shu.

ref: If Demetrius and his workers have a case against these men, we have courts and judges. Let them take their complaints there.
text: Onup…Ы kibui tili kpas…Ы Demetrio n…ЫћА y…Ыax…ФћГ…Ыw…Фa g…Ы babh…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ apl…Ыn…Ф y…Ы…Ы n…Ы an…Ф teli shu…Ф, kebhu okuluk…Ф …Фl…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы bag…Ы bee…Цi …Фma nabha tsy…Ы al…Ы, babaћАlaћА al…Фk…Ф kibui n…Ы al…Ы shu av…Ыn…Ф …Ыk…Ыl…Ы.

ref: But if you want to do more than that, the matter will have to be brought before the city council.
text: Onup…Ы kibui tili p…Ф kal…Ы g…Ы n…Фp…Ы …Фs…Ы t…ЫћА nofeke…Ы, k…Ыl…Ы …Фs…Ы bav…Ыn…Ф edibu k…Ыl…Ы m…Ы n…Ы …Фsha m…Ы.

ref: We could easily be accused of starting a riot today. There is no excuse for it! We cannot even give a reason for this uproar.
text: As…Ы kana g…Ы k…Ыl…Ы ana, kifu sisi l…Ы k…Ыl…Ыishu …Фs…Ы babaћА l…Фk…Ф kibui n…Ы obo…Ф oziћГ kp…Ыkp…Ы ebui al…Ы shu. N…Ы kibui …Ыl…Ы shu so…Ф, b…Фt…Ы balaћА bu ishu uluћГ n…Ы oziћГ kp…Ыkp…Ы …Фl…Ы shu, …Фm…Фs…Ы kesiluluћГ nanaћА ama k…Ыl…Ыishu.вАЭ

ref: After saying this, he told the people to leave.
text: G…Ы a…Ц…Ф kibui …Ыl…Ы ebeke…Ы, akakaћА …ФzaћГk…Ф.

ref: When the riot was over, Paul sent for the followers and encouraged them. He then told them goodbye and left for Macedonia.
text: G…Ы oziћГ kp…Ыkp…Ы ebui…Ы abafala, Paulo akp…Ы ban…Ф n…Ы bad…Фkpas…Ыan…Ы …Фk…Ф, k…Ыl…Ы g…Ы akp…Ы bal…Ы kemiћА ebeke…Ы, ebisi kidzo p…Ы ash…Ы av…Ы Makedonia.

ref: As he traveled from place to place, he encouraged the followers with many messages. Finally, he went to Greece
text: Any…Ф afala n…Ы k…Ыma …Ыl…Ы m…Ы, p…Ы al…Фk…Ф ka…Ц…Ф …Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф gelee akp…Ы ban…Ф kemi n…Ф, g…Фg…Ф…Ы n…Ф, ediyiћА n…Ы Hela b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы,

ref: and stayed there for three months. Paul was about to sail to Syria. But some of the Jewish leaders plotted against him, so he decided to return by way of Macedonia.
text: …Ыk…Ыl…Ы y…ЫazaћГ bewoele tataћБ. ∆Жm…Фs…Ы Yudan…Ы at…Ф…Ц…Ф kibui kpa n…Ыishu kibe…Ы g…Ы ap…Ы as…Ы t…ЫћА eku keliћГabhaohu av…Ы Siria, kliso…Ф at…Ф…Ц…Ф as…Ы etsodzi ad…ЫgaћГ Makedonia.

ref: With him were Sopater, son of Pyrrhus from Berea, and Aristarchus and Secundus from Thessalonica. Gaius from Derbe was also with him, and so were Timothy and the two Asians, Tychicus and Trophimus.
text: Soparte, Piro g…Ыede Beroa y…Ыeyiany…Ы azaћГ yiede, n…ЫћА Aristaxo n…ЫћА Sekundo g…Ыede Tesalonika, Gayo g…Ыede Derbe n…ЫћА Timoteo, n…ЫћА Tixiko n…ЫћА Trofimo g…Ыede Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы.

ref: They went on ahead to Troas and waited for us there.
text: Bany…Ы al…Ы eput…Ф edeepo b…Фl…Ф n…Ы Troa.

ref: After the Festival of Thin Bread, we sailed from Philippi. Five days later we met them in Troas and stayed there for a week. Paul's Last Visit to Troas
text: P…Ф buku keliћГabhaohu…Ф oden…Ф Filipi n…Ы kibe…Ы g…Ы ba≈ЛaћГ kifufuluћГ g…Ы K…Ыg…Ы NyanyaћГ Iwui…Ы ebeke, k…Ыl…Ы n…Ы ewui tetiћА ede…Ы b…Фd…Ы tapl…Ыn…Ф ban…Ф g…Фg…Ф n…Ы Troa k…Ыl…Ы b…ФzaћГ …Ыk…Ыl…Ы ewui tegegene. Bany…Ыm…Ы Eutixo Den…Ф Butsim…Ы N…Ы Troa

ref: On the first day of the week we met to break bread together. Paul spoke to the people until midnight because he was leaving the next morning.
text: N…Ы …Фg…Фn…Ы …Фl…Ы kiwui…Ы g…Ыiput…Ф nabhaa, b…Фba shogoћА …Фk…Ф b…Фl…Ф …Фhakp…Ыkp…Ы …Фd…ФћГ ≈Лa≈ЛaћГ. Paulo aza…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф …Фk…Ф banun…Ф …Фm…Фs…Ы at…Ф…Ц…Ф …Ыl…Ы as…Ы abash…Ы n…Ы kelizaza m…Ы, kliso aza…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф idiyin…Ф elishi tetiћА.

ref: In the upstairs room where we were meeting, there were a lot of lamps.
text: Bad…Ыk…Ы efuћА gelee elu kabha buvuћГ…Ф m…Ы, n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы g…Ы b…ФzaћГ k…Ыtakpu t…Фt…ФћГ m…Ы.

ref: A young man by the name of Eutychus was sitting on a window sill. While Paul was speaking, the young man got very sleepy. Finally, he went to sleep and fell three floors all the way down to the ground. When they picked him up, he was dead.
text: Ta…Цa zibuku any…Ы ayis…ФћГ teli g…Ы bekulu y…Ыas…Ы Eutixo…Ф, kibe…Ы g…Ы Paulo azaћГ y…Ыa…Ц…Ф …Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф nabha. Kibe…Ы g…Ы abav…Ыn…Ф ta…Цa m…Ы…Ы, abaw…Фl…Ы eden…Ф kabha buvuћГ…Ф g…Ы babh…Ф at…Ф…Ц…Ф b…Фta…Цam…Ы nabha abad…Ф kesiakpa k…Ыl…Ы g…Ы befeke y…Ы etitsiћБ.

ref: Paul went down and bent over Eutychus. He took him in his arms and said, вАЬDon't worry! He's alive.вАЭ
text: Paulo ezhi av…Ы kesi…Ы, al…Фk…Ф y…Ыishu at…Ф…Ц…Ф ayis…ФћГ nabha k…Ыl…Ы al…Фk…Ф y…Ы …Ыh…Ф…Ы akp…Ы akana y…Ыishu…Ф, p…Ы a…Ц…Ф as…Ы, вАЬN…ФotosiћА kifuћА, al…Ы n…ЫkpaћГ!вАЭ

ref: After Paul had gone back upstairs, he broke bread, and ate with us. He then spoke until dawn and left.
text: K…Ыl…Ы ezewu av…Ы kabha buvuћГ…Ф m…Ы, p…Ы ad…Ыya kifufuluћГ n…Ф ataћГ. G…Ы a…Ц…Фa…Ц…Ф p…Ы keli…Ы azaa, abash…Ы.

ref: Then the followers took the young man home alive and were very happy. The Voyage from Troas to Miletus
text: Banun…Ф agbana any…Ы ayis…ФћГ av…Ыn…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы enunuћА p…Ы bal…Ы kituћБ…Ф m…Ы d…Ф al…Ы f…ФћГ…Ф. Paulo T…Ыsh…Ыsh…Ы N…Ы Efeso

ref: Paul decided to travel by land to Assos. The rest of us went on ahead by ship, and we were to take him aboard there.
text: B…Фv…Ы k…Ыl…Ы abha ditsoku keliћГabhaohu…Ф m…Ы, p…Ы b…Фv…Ы Aso t…ЫћА b…Фd…Ы t…Фn…Ф Paulo t…Ы ekuћА keliћГabhaohu…Ф apl…Ыn…Ф …Фl…Ф. Abh…Ыt…Ы t…Ыt…Фt…Ф…Ц…Ф …Ыl…Ы …Фm…Фs…Ы azaћГ b…Фts…Ы…Ц…Ыkp…Ф kidzo abha av…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы.

ref: When he met us in Assos, he came aboard, and we sailed on to Mitylene.
text: G…Ы abat…Фn…Ф b…Фl…Ф n…Ы Aso…Ф, eku keliћГabhaohu…Ф …Фpl…Ыn…Ф b…Фl…Ф, p…Ы b…Фv…Ы Mitilene.

ref: The next day we came to a place near Chios, and the following day we reached Samos. The day after that we sailed to Miletus.
text: G…Ы keli…Ы azaa, buku keliћГabhaohu…Ф n…Ы …Ыk…Ыl…Ы p…Ы budiyiћА n…Ы Xio. G…Ы keli…Ы azazaa, b…Фtsak…Ы …Фv…Ы Samo, k…Ыl…Ы g…Ы keli…Ы azaa, budiyiћА n…Ы Mileto.

ref: Paul had decided to sail on past Ephesus, because he did not want to spend too much time in Asia. He was in a hurry and wanted to be in Jerusalem in time for Pentecost. Paul Says Goodbye to the Church Leaders of Ephesus
text: Paulo at…Ф…Ц…Ф …Ыl…Ы as…Ы t…Ы afala n…Ы Efeso …ФbhaћА, t…ЫћА etibeћАziћГ kibeћА n…Ы Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы, …Фm…Фs…Ы ap…Ы zia t…ЫћА ediku Yerusalem, onup…Ы abap…Ы t…ЫћА azaћГ …Ыk…Ыl…Ы n…Ы Pentekoste kiwui nabha.

ref: From Miletus, Paul sent a message for the church leaders at Ephesus to come and meet with him.
text: Den…Ф Mileto…Ф, Paulo akp…Ы ban…Ф n…Ы Efeso …Фham…Ы beshesheћА…Ы …Фk…Ф.

ref: When they got there, he said: You know everything I did during the time I was with you when I first came to Asia.
text: G…Ы bebeku…Ф, etse…Цe al…Ы as…Ы, вАЬNo…ФnyiћА kana g…Ы …ЫzanaћА m…ЫkpaћГ, kibe…Ы g…Ы …ЫzaћГ w…Фn…Ф …Фbha, oden…Ф kiwui…Ы g…Ыiput…Ф g…Ы …Ыbaku Asia b…Фd…ФћГ m…Ы.

ref: Some of the Jews plotted against me and caused me a lot of sorrow and trouble. But I served the Lord and was humble.
text: ∆Рl…Ыk…Ф ishu esi zhizhin…Ф hohoe n…ЫћА …Ыw…Фm…Ы kp…Ы k…Ыtakpu esi …Фk…Ф Apalete…Ы n…Ф, g…Ы Yudan…Ы al…Фk…Ф k…Ыtakpu m…Ы kpa t…Фt…Ф…Ц…Ф efeke m…Ы…Цi n…Ф nyagaa flogo.

ref: When I preached in public or taught in your homes, I didn't hold back from telling anything that would help you.
text: N…Фonyi …Фs…Ы igi yide n…Ы ebui …Ц…Ф…Ц…Ф n…Фn…Ф g…Ы laba apl…Ыn…Ф w…Фn…Ф shu, p…Ф …Ыkas…Ы w…Фn…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ n…Ы k…Ыtsal…Ы m…Ы, n…ЫћА den…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы …Фv…Ыn…Ф b…ФpaћГ m…Ы.

ref: I told Jews and Gentiles to turn to God and have faith in our Lord Jesus.
text: ∆Рdal…Ы k…Ыl…Ы m…Ы …Фk…Ф Yudan…Ы n…ЫћА Helan…Ы …Фs…Ы t…Ы betsyina at…Фn…Ф Owusoso Akaa n…ЫћА bal…Ы etuћБ…Ф t…ЫћА bay…Ыk…Ы Apalete Yesu abha a≈ЛaћГ.

ref: I don't know what will happen to me in Jerusalem, but I must obey God's Spirit and go there.

ref: Join with them and prepare yourself for the ceremony that goes with the promises. Pay the cost for their heads to be shaved. Then everyone will learn that the reports about you are not true. They will know you do obey the Law of Moses.
text: GbanaћА bany…Ы al…Ы …Фv…Ыn…Ф, t…ЫћА w…Фn…Ф al…Ы odiplu shu t…ЫћА …Фbuia k…Ыl…Ы shu abh…Ы, s…Ы t…ЫћА bash…Ы atakpu…Ф …Фk…Ф al…Ы. K…Ыl…Ы aka nyia aka ebetiћА as…ЫћА ebui al…Ы g…Ы ba…Ц…Ф n…Ы w…Фshu…Ф ama al…Ы m…ЫћА, t…ЫћА k…Ыkas…Ы …Фs…ЫћА w…Фtsy…Ы oshuћА …Фshaa.

ref: Some while ago we told the Gentile followers what we think they should do. We instructed them not to eat anything offered to idols. They were told not to eat any meat with blood still in it or the meat of an animal that has been strangled. They were also told not to commit any terrible sexual sins.
text: Bag…Ы betinu Yudan…Ы p…Ы bay…Ыk…Ы a≈ЛaћГ x…Фn…Ф…Ф, b…Фt…Ы f…Фn…Ф keplukpa ak…Ф al…Ы n…Ы k…Ыg…Ы b…Фt…Ф…Ц…Ф shu …Фs…Ы, bat…Ы a≈ЛaћГ b…Фd…ФћГ g…Ы bat…Ф …Фk…Ф ibudi…Ы, dzyosu n…ЫћА k…Ыdzya gideћА bagaћГ g…Ы bedzyiniћА bal…Ы ili…Ы, n…ЫћА t…ЫћА bataka≈ЛaћГ k…Ыg…Фl…Ф.вАЭ

ref: The next day Paul took the four men with him and got himself ready at the same time they did. Then he went into the temple and told when the final ceremony would take place and when an offering would be made for each of them. Paul Is Arrested

ref: When the period of seven days for the ceremony was almost over, some of the Jewish people from Asia saw Paul in the temple. They got a large crowd together and started attacking him.

Any…Ы g…Ы akas…Ы ban…Ф n…Ф petee b…Фd…ФћГ n…Ы …Фk…Ф nyia …Фk…Ф afalan…Ф p…Ы al…Ф…ЫtitiћБ n…Ы b…Фl…Ф banun…Ф n…ЫћА …Фshaa shu n…ЫћА …Ыk…Ыl…Ы tsy…Ы n…Ы al…Ы. N…Ы k…Ыl…ЫћА niede…Ы, ad…Ыgbana Helan…Ы amana AkaavuћГ…Ф shu p…Ы akp…Ы …Фdadal…Ы …Фk…Фl…ЫћА b…Фts…ФћГ.вАЭ

ref: The whole city was in an uproar, and the people turned into a mob. They grabbed Paul and dragged him out of the temple. Then suddenly the doors were shut.

K…Ыl…Ы…Ы GagaliћГ TifufuћА

ref: Since none of us had eaten anything for a long time, Paul stood up and told the men: You should have listened to me! If you had stayed on in Crete, you would not have had this damage and loss.

ref: The governor of the island was named Publius, and he owned some of the land around there. Publius was very friendly and welcomed us into his home for three days.

ref: His father was in bed, sick with fever and stomach trouble, and Paul went to visit him. Paul healed the man by praying and placing his hands on him.

ref: The people were very respectful to us, and when we sailed, they gave us everything we needed. From Malta to Rome
text: Bad…Ыm…Ы b…Фl…Ф ibui n…Ы edzo gelee abha, k…Ыl…Ы n…Ы kibe…Ы g…Ы b…ФbaћА t…Фn…ФћА keliћГabha kidzo…Ф, bak…Ф …Фl…Ф b…Фd…ФћГ g…Ы b…Ф…Фp…Ы n…ФћА. Roma Tikuku

ref: Three months later we sailed in a ship that had been docked at Malta for the winter. The ship was from Alexandria in Egypt and was known as вАЬThe Twin Gods.вАЭ
